title: Mutual Release of Claims
description: A mutual release agreement signed by two parties who agree to drop all current or future legal disputes and release each other from liability.
whatsCovered: Definition of Party A and Party B participating in the release
Mutual waiver of all historical and future legal claims
Covenant not to sue each other regarding the dispute
whenToUse: Use this mutual release agreement when ending a partnership, resolving a contractor dispute, or settling a business claim where both parties agree to walk away without further litigation.

fields.label: Party B Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 500 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10022

fields.label: Description of Settled Dispute
fields.placeholder: e.g. the software development delay disputes arising during the Winter 2025 campaign...

clauses.heading: MUTUAL RELEASE AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This Mutual Release Agreement (the "Release") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a}, located at {party_a_address} ("Party A"), and {party_b}, located at {party_b_address} ("Party B").

clauses.heading: 1. Mutual Release & Discharge
clauses.body: Party A and Party B, on behalf of themselves and their successors, hereby mutually release, acquit, and forever discharge each other from any and all claims, liabilities, lawsuits, and causes of action arising from the following dispute: {dispute_desc}.

clauses.heading: 2. Covenant Not to Sue
clauses.body: Each Party covenants and agrees that it will not institute, maintain, or assist in any lawsuit, administrative claim, or arbitration against the other Party regarding any matter released under this Agreement.

clauses.heading: 3. Mutual Non-Disparagement
clauses.body: Neither Party shall make, publish, or communicate to any person or in any public forum any comments, statements, or reviews that are defamatory, derogatory, or disparaging to the other Party's business reputation.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Release shall be governed and interpreted according to the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can either of us sue the other later?
faq.answer: No. Once both parties sign a mutual release, all legal disputes regarding that specific event are permanently closed, and both parties waive the right to sue.

faq.question: Does this cover future contracts we might sign?
faq.answer: No. A mutual release only settles past disputes specifically named in the agreement. It does not waive liability for future unrelated contracts or actions.
